creator: mario@tecdigital.net
text:
Submitter-Id:	current-users
 Confidential:	no 
 Synopsis:	MD5 Checksum on port malsync-2.06_1 is wrong 
 Severity:	non-critical
 Priority:	low 
 Category:	ports
 Class:		update 
 Release:	FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE i386
 Environment:
 System: FreeBSD gandalf.localdomain 4.4-STABLE FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE #0: Fri Nov 23 02:37:58 CST 2001 root@gandalf.localdomain:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GANDALF i386
 
 Description:
 	After issuing "make install" on the /usr/ports/palm/malsync, it bombs
 	stating a checksum mismatch. Using make NO_CHECKSUMS=yes install corrects the problem.
 	This also affects the syncmal port.
 
 How-To-Repeat:
 	Do a "make install" on /usr/ports/palm/malsync
 
 Fix:
 	Update /usr/ports/palm/malsync/distinfo to show the correct MD5 checksum.
 	The correct value is: 08ff5b0ce3d2c7eaf616929f4ada913d
